titles.title: Read your Bible, Pray every day

authors.author: Unbekannt
Harry D. Clarke
Lies die Bibel, bet jeden Tag

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Read your Bible, Pray every day, Read your Bible, Pray every day, Read your Bible, Pray every day, /: And you’ll grow, grow, grow. :/ x3 Read your Bible, Pray every day, And you’ll grow, grow, grow.
